items.title: A primitive dwarf galaxy with almost none of the heavy elements found in the Milky Way is somehow producing iron and sil
items.desc: The dwarf galaxy Sextans A is poor in the elements astronomers collectively call metals. Yet observations from the James Webb Space Telescope indicate that two of its ageing stars are making dust from silicon carbide and, probably, almost pure metallic iron. …
